idea-plugin.name: Inline Call Unfold
idea-plugin.description:
Inline Call Unfold — inline call expansion for Go

Put the caret on a Go function call and Unfold splices the callee's body inline, between the lines — rendered over the real source file so the expanded code keeps native semantic colors, hover/quick-doc, go-to-definition, find-usages, and code folding. Read a call chain top-to-bottom without losing your place or opening a dozen tabs.

  • Expand inline — splice the callee body below the current line; expand again to collapse.
  • Nested expansion — expand calls inside an expanded frame; the frame grows to fit.
  • In-frame folding — fold blocks inside a frame; the frame re-fits as you collapse.
  • Keyboard navigation — descend into a frame, jump back to the call site, or collapse it.
  • Recursion aware — re-entered callees are flagged so deep chains stay legible.

Requires the Go plugin (bundled in GoLand; available in IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.2

  • Removed the experimental painted and JCEF renderers (and the renderer picker) — the embedded native-editor frame is now the only renderer.

0.1.1

  • Clickable file:line header navigation, recursion badge, in-frame section folding, and keyboard navigation (focus frame / focus parent / collapse frame).

action.description: Splice the callee body below the current line.
Move focus down into the frame expanded on the current line.
From inside a frame, move focus back to its call site.
Collapse the frame the caret is inside.
